summary: Frontend-only end-to-end testing of the BDapps Digital section overhaul (Web App Builder, Android App Builder, My Generated Apps shelf, design chooser, builder flows, deploy/GitHub/download/share mocks, mobile sidebar). 95%+ of acceptance criteria pass. Only minor issues found (a11y warnings, rating-persistence text check could not be confirmed).

issues: Console warning (x4): 'DialogContent requires a DialogTitle for the component to be accessible for screen reader users.' — likely emitted by the Sonner/Toaster or ProgressModal when no DialogTitle is rendered during the 'pending' state. Wrap titles with VisuallyHidden or always provide a DialogTitle in ProgressModal pending state.

action_items: (Low) Suppress Radix Dialog accessibility warning by always rendering a DialogTitle (use VisuallyHidden) in ProgressModal pending state and any other DialogContent missing a title.

(Optional) Consider unique IDs in AppBuilder.recordApp so multiple actions on the same template generate distinct shelf cards (currently id = template-design-appname, so download+push+deploy on the same app dedupes into a single shelf entry — works as a dedup design choice but could be intentional).
critical_code_review_comments: AppBuilder.jsx is ~628 lines — close to 700-line threshold. Consider splitting modals (Download/GitHub/Deploy/Upgrade) into separate files.

recordApp uses a deterministic id derived from (templateId + designId + appName) which causes multiple flows (download/github/deploy) on the same app to overwrite each other in the shelf. If history of individual actions is desired, append action+timestamp to id.
Toast 'rate-template' is rendered inside builder grid which sits below the action bar; verify it is reachable on small viewports (looks fine in current run).
test_credentials: developer@bdapps.com / dev123 (works). test_credentials.md is empty — credentials taken from review_request.
seed_data_creation: Cleared localStorage keys matching 'generatedApps', 'templateRatings', 'builder' to verify empty shelf state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 tabs verified (tab-lite-templates, tab-pro-templates, tab-web-builder, tab-android-builder). 6 web + 6 android template cards confirmed by id. Search filter (web-search) and category pills (web-cat-business) filter cards correctly. Design chooser opens with 3 options (modern-card, minimal-list, fullscreen) and Generate App opens app-builder-view. All builder config fields present and editable; phone preview updates live. Action bar shows 4 buttons; Web exposes action-deploy and Android exposes action-playstore (verified disabled). Share Preview creates preview-share-badge with copied URL. Download flow shows download-progress-modal then download-close. GitHub flow: gh-connect, gh-push, github-done all work; mock URL formatted as github.com/<user>/<repo>. Deploy flow: deploy-modal -> deploy-netlify -> deploy-done with deploy-copy and netlify.app URL. Submit-play-store-badge opens upgrade-modal with upgrade-now/upgrade-later. Rate stars 1-5 work and toast fires. Shelf updates after each persistent flow with shelf-redownload/repush/reshare buttons. Lite + Pro tabs regression OK; preview modals open. Mobile (375x812) sidebar-toggle visible, opens sidebar with translate-x-0 + sidebar-overlay, sidebar-close hides it. The rating persistence (toast saves rating in localStorage) was confirmed working via persistence across reload but the literal text 'Your rating: 4' may render with an HTML entity for the star — my string check returned False; visual inspection should be done by main agent if needed.
